description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled sandals from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office wear and for parties. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 1" Upper Padded synthetic leather footbed, ergonomically curved for absolute comfort and style Soft textile straps with a shining external finish on the forefoot and back heel, with an elasticated strap on the midfoot to offer a customised Fit Outsole TPU outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel base for absolute grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
